properties.name: Simon van der Stel Freeway
properties.sim_role: boundary — M3 freeway bridge over study area
properties.notes: M3 motorway bridge; not on any modelled school route; forms northern boundary of study zone

properties.name: Main Road
properties.sim_role: boundary — M4 arterial; entry point J1 (TIA Int.4)
properties.notes: M4 Main Road; J1 right-turn from Dreyersdal operates at LOS F in AM and PM peaks; 11% of school trips enter via this junction

properties.name: Childrens Way
properties.sim_role: routes 2B, 2B-RR1/RR2/RR3 westbound from J8 signal (TIA Int.3) to J26/J27
properties.notes: Children's Way western section from J27 to J26; residential collector; 25% of school trips enter via this road from Ladies Mile signal

properties.name: Tussendal Avenue
properties.sim_role: rat runs 1A-RR4/RR5/RR6 from J23 (Tussendal/Airlie) south to J21 (Farm Rd/Tussendal)
properties.notes: Tussendal Avenue full length merged from two OSM features (way/27669865 + way/690833052); runs from J23 [18.452612,-34.053158] to J21 [18.455408,-34.055798]; quiet residential street used as rat run

properties.name: Starke Road
properties.sim_role: routes 1A main (J27/J22→J4); 1A-RR2/3/4/5/6; 2A-RR1/RR2; 2B-RR1; 3A-RR1/RR2
properties.notes: Starke Road full north-south spine from J12 (Firgrove/Starke) to J3 (Farm Rd south); passes through J27 (Children's Way), J22 (Airlie Rd), J24 (Clement Rd), J10 (Homestead Ave), J4 (Christopher Rd); carries highest rat-run volumes in study area; SPEED HUMPS present along route (local knowledge) — reduces effective speed and increases travel time for rat-run traffic

properties.name: Christopher Road
properties.sim_role: routes 1A, 1A-RR1, 2A, 2A-RR2, 2B, 3A; final approach J5→J4→J18
properties.notes: Christopher Road connects J5 (Vineyard/Christopher) through J4 (Starke/Christopher, TIA Int.5 all-way stop) to J18 (Dreyersdal/Christopher east); terminal funnel junction for most main routes

properties.name: Ruskin Road
properties.sim_role: school ingress final approach J7→J17; rat runs 1A-RR3/RR4, 2B-RR3
properties.notes: Ruskin Road; 30 km/h speed limit; 400 veh/hr capacity (TIA); 22 on-street parking bays proposed; raised intersection at J7 (school ingress) proposed

properties.name: Alban Road
properties.sim_role: local road — not on modelled routes
properties.notes: Short residential road; not part of any modelled school route

properties.name: Vineyard Road
properties.sim_role: routes 1A, 1A-RR1/RR2/RR6, 2A, 2A-RR1, 2B, 2B-RR2, 3A, 3A-RR1; final approach J6→J5 and cut-through via J19
properties.notes: Vineyard Road from J6 (Leyden/Vineyard) through J5 (Christopher/Vineyard) to J19 (Vineyard east/Airlie); stop-controlled; used by majority of ingress routes on final approach segment

properties.name: Aristea Road
properties.sim_role: school egress J20 (Aristea Rd); egress-only route
properties.notes: Aristea Road; 20 km/h speed limit; 350 veh/hr capacity (TIA); cul-de-sac on school side; raised intersection proposed at J20; proposed mini-roundabout at Ruskin/Aristea junction; sidewalk on school side proposed

properties.name: Brian Road
properties.sim_role: local road — not on modelled routes
properties.notes: Brian Road; short residential cul-de-sac area; not part of any modelled school route

properties.name: Dante Road

properties.notes: Dante Road from J14 (Airlie/Dante south) through J17 (Dante/Ruskin) to J16 (Dante/Vineyard); quiet residential; used by multiple rat-run routes to bypass J5/J6 congestion

properties.name: Airlie Road
properties.sim_role: main route 2B (J15→J18); rat runs 1A-RR2/3/4/5/6 and 2B-RR2/3 (J14→J23→J19→J15)
properties.notes: Airlie Road from J14 (Airlie/Dante south) through J23 (Tussendal/Airlie), J19 (Vineyard east/Airlie) to J15 (Airlie/Dreyersdal); key cut-through corridor used by multiple rat-run variants

properties.name: Ladies Mile Road

properties.name: M3 Cycleway Bridge

properties.notes: Shared cycleway/footway bridge over M3; active travel infrastructure only

properties.name: Dreyersdal Road
properties.sim_role: main routes 2B (J26→J15→J18), 3A (J13→J28); rat runs 1A-RR1 (J1→J15→J18); primary north-south collector in study area
properties.notes: Dreyersdal Road full length from J13 (Firgrove/Dreyersdal, TIA Int.1) through J26 (Children's Way), J15 (Airlie/Dreyersdal), J18 (Christopher east), J28 (Homestead Ave) to J1 (Main Rd, TIA Int.4); 2-lane undivided collector; carries significant school trip volumes; SPEED HUMPS present along route (local knowledge) — reduces effective speed and increases travel time despite higher posted speed limit

properties.name: Leyden Road

properties.notes: Firgrove Way service road connecting J12 to J13; used by rat run 3A-RR2 to bypass Dreyersdal Rd entirely and access school via Starke Rd north

properties.notes: Clement Road from J25 (Clement/Leyden) to J24 (Starke/Clement); used by rat-run routes 2A-RR1 and 3A-RR1 to bypass J4/J5 funnel approaching school via Leyden Rd; stop-controlled at both ends

properties.name: Dreyersdal Farm Road

properties.notes: Dreyersdal Farm Road from J2 [18.459043,-34.055213] through J3 [18.456319,-34.055697] to J21 [18.455408,-34.055798]; key decision point for all Route 1A variants; yield-controlled at J2; J3 node inserted to ensure accurate road-snap routing
